concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types once for all focused View enforcement bundles.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, coalesce(type.sourceFileName, '') AS sourceFileName, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'InspectorEntry.java' THEN 'INSPECTOR_ENTRY' WHEN size(segments) >= 6 AND segments[2] = 'slotcontent' AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Binder.java' THEN 'BINDER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND (sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PresentationModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContributionModel.java' OR sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ContentModel.java') THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'Contribution.java' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'IntentHandler.java' THEN 'HANDLER' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'ViewInputEvent.java' THEN 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'PublishedEvent.java' THEN 'PUBLISHED_EVENT' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['leftbartabs', 'statetabs', 'dropdowns'] AND sourceFileName ENDS WITH 'View.java' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS ViewLayerType
